requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — BIS CRS under IS 13252 (Part 1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — IS 13252（第1部分）下的BIS CRS注册
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — IS 13252（第1部分）下的BIS CRS註冊

summary.en: India's Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) operates the Compulsory Registration Scheme (CRS) for notified electronics and IT products. For many information technology and audio/video products relevant to wireless/IoT devices, the safety standard historically referenced under CRS is IS 13252 (Part 1), aligned with IEC 60950-1 for information technology equipment safety. Where a product category is notified under the Electronics and Information Technology Goods (Requirements for Compulsory Registration) Order and related BIS/MeitY notifications, registration is a mandatory legal gate before sale in India. The standard supplies voluntary test evidence and presumption of conformity; the mandatory obligation comes from the notified Order and BIS registration requirement.
summary.zh: 印度标准局（BIS）对公告电子和信息技术产品实施强制注册计划（CRS）。对于许多与无线/物联网设备相关的信息技术及音视频产品，CRS历史上引用的安全标准为IS 13252（第1部分），该标准与信息技术设备安全标准IEC 60950-1相对应。若产品类别被《电子和信息技术产品（强制注册要求）令》及相关BIS/MeitY通知列入目录，则在印度销售前取得注册是强制法律门槛。标准提供自愿测试证据和符合性推定；强制义务来自公告令和BIS注册要求。
summary.zht: 印度標準局（BIS）對公告電子和資訊技術產品實施強制註冊計劃（CRS）。對於許多與無線/物聯網裝置相關的資訊技術及音視頻產品，CRS歷史上引用的安全標準為IS 13252（第1部分），該標準與資訊技術設備安全標準IEC 60950-1相對應。若產品類別被《電子和資訊技術產品（強制註冊要求）令》及相關BIS/MeitY通知列入目錄，則在印度銷售前取得註冊是強制法律門檻。標準提供自願測試證據和符合性推定；強制義務來自公告令和BIS註冊要求。

standards_or_laws: Electronics and Information Technology Goods (Requirements for Compulsory Registration) Order and amendments — mandatory where product category is notified
BIS Compulsory Registration Scheme (CRS) — mandatory registration route for notified products
IS 13252 (Part 1) — safety standard used as voluntary presumption/test evidence

summary.en: In China, many IT and telecom terminal products are covered by CCC where listed, commonly using GB 4943.1 for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety. CCC and Chinese GB test reports are mandatory for covered China market products but do not replace BIS CRS registration or Indian test evidence for notified Indian product categories.
summary.zh: 在中国，许多信息技术和电信终端产品在列入目录时适用CCC，通常使用GB 4943.1作为音视频、信息和通信技术设备安全标准。对于覆盖的中国市场产品，CCC和中国GB检测报告为强制要求，但不能替代印度公告产品类别所需的BIS CRS注册或印度测试证据。
summary.zht: 在中國，許多資訊技術和電信終端產品在列入目錄時適用CCC，通常使用GB 4943.1作為音視頻、資訊和通訊技術設備安全標準。對於覆蓋的中國市場產品，CCC和中國GB檢測報告為強制要求，但不能取代印度公告產品類別所需的BIS CRS註冊或印度測試證據。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification for covered products
GB 4943.1 — China safety standard for covered AV/ICT equipment

gap.en: A China CCC certificate should be screened against India's CRS product list. If the wireless/IoT device is a notified Indian category, the manufacturer normally needs BIS-recognised test evidence to IS 13252 (Part 1) or the currently notified Indian standard and a BIS CRS registration number before sale. The practical gap is category mapping and Indian registration, not merely translation of a Chinese CCC certificate.
gap.zh: 应将中国CCC证书与印度CRS产品目录进行比对。若无线/物联网设备属于印度公告类别，制造商通常需要取得BIS认可的IS 13252（第1部分）或当前公告印度标准测试证据，并在销售前取得BIS CRS注册号。实际差距是类别映射和印度注册，而不只是翻译中国CCC证书。
gap.zht: 應將中國CCC證書與印度CRS產品目錄進行比對。若無線/物聯網裝置屬於印度公告類別，製造商通常需要取得BIS認可的IS 13252（第1部分）或當前公告印度標準測試證據，並在銷售前取得BIS CRS註冊號。實際差距是類別映射和印度註冊，而不只是翻譯中國CCC證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where notified — BIS CRS registration required for covered electronics under the Compulsory Registration Order; IS 13252 test standard is voluntary presumption evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where listed — CCC required for covered China product categories

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BIS CRS is a separate India safety registration gate for notified electronics. CCC and GB 4943.1 evidence may help with engineering review but does not substitute for BIS registration when the Indian product category is notified.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】BIS CRS是公告电子产品单独的印度安全注册门槛。CCC和GB 4943.1证据可辅助工程审查，但在印度产品类别被公告时不能替代BIS注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】BIS CRS是公告電子產品單獨的印度安全註冊門檻。CCC和GB 4943.1證據可輔助工程審查，但在印度產品類別被公告時不能取代BIS註冊。
